verse_text: Then the sorcerers of Egypt did the same with their sorceries; and Pharaoh's heart was hardened, and he did not heed them, as the Lord said.

pericope.title: The Plague of Water Turned to Blood

links.context: As in the first plague of Egypt ([[EXO.7:14]]-25), the sea, marine life, and maritime commerce are affected.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
